targets.description: The suite uses the official @anthropic-ai/sdk client against the managed agents endpoint.
The official SDK memory helper surface remains absent for managed agents.
A session can use a Claude engine selected by LLM vault metadata.
A session can use a Codex engine selected by LLM vault metadata.
Agent creation accepts the SDK string model shorthand.
Agent creation accepts object model configuration.
Agent toolset configuration round-trips through the SDK.
MCP toolset configuration round-trips through the SDK.
Custom tool configuration round-trips through the SDK.
always_allow permission policies are accepted.
always_ask permission policies are accepted.
Agent update rejects stale versions.
Agent update can clear array fields.
Agent metadata null values delete keys.
Cloud environment defaults are returned when config is omitted.
Limited networking returns explicit default boolean flags.
Environment metadata null values delete keys.
Text files upload, download, list, and delete through the SDK.
Binary files round-trip through the SDK.
Files support cursor pagination.
Deleted file metadata retrieval returns a not found error.
Session creation accepts an agent ID string.
Session creation accepts a pinned agent reference object.
Session metadata updates round-trip through the SDK.
Session list filters round-trip through the SDK.
Archived sessions can be listed.
File session resources can be added, listed, retrieved, and deleted.
GitHub repository resources can be supplied at session creation.
GitHub repository resource tokens can be rotated.
Text user.message blocks are accepted.
Base64 image blocks are accepted.
URL image blocks are accepted.
File-backed image blocks are accepted.
Plain text document blocks are accepted.
Base64 document blocks are accepted.
URL document blocks are accepted.
File-backed document blocks are accepted.
Session events can be streamed through the SDK.
Event list ascending order works.
Event list descending order works.
agent.message events round-trip through the SDK.
session.status_idle events round-trip through the SDK.
Tool confirmation requires_action outcomes round-trip.
Custom tool requires_action outcomes round-trip.
agent.tool_use events round-trip through the SDK.
agent.tool_result events round-trip through the SDK.
agent.mcp_tool_use events round-trip through the SDK.
agent.mcp_tool_result events round-trip through the SDK.
span.model_request_start events round-trip through the SDK.
span.model_request_end events round-trip through the SDK.
retries_exhausted outcomes round-trip through the SDK.
Multi-agent thread signals are represented as SDK session events.
Custom skills can be created from multipart files.
Custom skills accept multiple uploaded files.
Custom skill versions can be created.
Custom skill versions can be attached to agents.
Custom skill listing source filters work.
Anthropic skill listing source filters work.
Static bearer credentials can be created and updated.
MCP OAuth credentials can be created and updated.
OAuth token_endpoint_auth none is accepted.
OAuth client_secret_post credentials are redacted in responses.
OAuth client_secret_basic updates are redacted in responses.
Vault metadata null values delete keys.
Credential metadata null values delete keys.
Archived vaults can be listed.
Archived credentials can be listed.
